name: RadiFi Credit Union - Glen Kernan Parkway
description_short: RadiFi Credit Union's Glen Kernan Parkway branch offers full-service banking with competitive rates on savings and loans, located in Jacksonville's upscale Glen Kernan community near the beaches.
description_long:
RadiFi Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative operating the Glen Kernan Parkway branch in Jacksonville, Florida, at the intersection of Hodges Boulevard and Glen Kernan Parkway. The branch serves the local Jacksonville Beaches community with traditional credit union banking services. The institution emphasizes convenience and community engagement, offering both in-person and digital banking options to its membership.

The Glen Kernan Parkway branch provides a comprehensive range of financial services including deposit accounts, loan products, wealth management, and commercial lending. Current promotional offerings include a 13-Month Certificate Special at 3.75% APY, High-Yield Checking accounts earning up to 4.00% APY, auto loan refinancing with a 0.25% rate reduction, mortgage loans with $1,000 cash back incentives, and a Visa credit card with 1.90% introductory APR for 12 months. The branch maintains both lobby and drive-up services, with an on-site Interactive Teller Machine (ITM) and 24-hour ATM for member convenience.

The branch distinguishes itself through its location in an upscale residential community and emphasis on personalized member service. The branch team includes dedicated specialists for mortgages, commercial lending, business services, and wealth management. Members report positive experiences with staff professionalism and service quality. The credit union offers a referral program providing $25 incentives and a mobile banking app for digital account management.

As a credit union branch rather than a full-service financial institution headquarters, this location's scope is limited to branch-level operations. The organization is subject to standard credit union regulatory requirements and member eligibility criteria. Competitive rates on certificates and checking accounts may require minimum deposits ($2,500 for the CD special). The branch maintains traditional banking hours (9 AM–5 PM weekdays, 9 AM–1 PM Saturday) which may not accommodate all scheduling needs.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: High-yield checking accounts earning up to 4.00% APY for competitive savings rates
13-month CD special at 3.75% APY with only $2,500 minimum deposit requirement
On-site Interactive Teller Machine (ITM) for extended service hours beyond lobby operation
Dedicated mortgage specialist (Jim Bystrzycki, NMLS #1000667) with $1,000 cash back incentive on new home mortgages
Commercial lending department with dedicated loan officer (Terri Blay) for business members
Wealth management services available through RadiFi Credit Union Wealth Solutions
Mobile banking app for digital account access and management
Member referral program offering $25 incentives for new account openings
cons: Limited to branch-level services; major lending decisions may require contact with main credit union office
Lobby hours (9 AM–5 PM weekdays) exclude early morning and evening access without drive-up/ATM
Saturday hours limited to 9 AM–1 PM, reducing weekend accessibility compared to some competitor banks
CD special requires $2,500 minimum deposit, which may exceed some savers' immediate capacity
As a credit union, membership eligibility requirements may restrict access compared to traditional banks
best_for: Residents of the Jacksonville Beaches and Glen Kernan Parkway communities seeking local branch banking
Savers prioritizing high-yield checking and CD rates for deposit growth
Small business owners needing commercial lending and business banking services from a local relationship manager
Homebuyers in the Jacksonville area interested in mortgage financing with cash-back incentives
diagnosis: This branch is best for Jacksonville Beaches residents and local businesses seeking full-service credit union banking with competitive savings rates and personalized relationship management. The primary caveat is that as a credit union branch rather than independent institution, major decisions require membership eligibility and centralized processing, and service hours are more limited than some competitor banks.
services: Auto Loan Refinancing (0.25% rate reduction promotion)
New Home Mortgage Loans ($1,000 cash back incentive)
Visa Credit Card (1.90% intro APR for 12 months)
Drive-up Interactive Teller Machine (ITM) deposits and cash transactions
Commercial lending and business banking services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
